name: code-analyzers-root
description: Repo-root orchestration: git hooks (Lefthook) and per-root pass-throughs. App packages live under ts/ (see CONVENTIONS.md).

scripts.analyze:self: pnpm build && pnpm coverage && node ts/cli/dist/index.js . --coverage-report ts/coverage/coverage-final.json --lint-cwd "$PWD/ts" --lint-bin "$PWD/ts/node_modules/.bin/biome"
